blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,451 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 13".
